raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Context setter","name":"What feels most important to sort out today, Carla?","description":"Lets Carla choose the most relevant thread before the manager gets specific.","purpose":"topic","stage":"pulse","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Role split strain","name":"Where is the split between AZPocket and the CoE getting hardest to hold?","description":"Surfaces the specific point where the two leadership hats are colliding.","purpose":"topic","stage":"friction","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]},{"label":"Tradeoff pressure","name":"What are you having to say no to more often than you'd like?","description":"Reveals what is being dropped or deferred because of the dual scope.","purpose":"topic","stage":"friction","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Waiting on decisions","name":"What are you waiting on that keeps slowing both lanes down?","description":"Identifies dependencies or decisions that are quietly stalling progress.","purpose":"topic","stage":"momentum","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Ownership split","name":"What part of the AZPocket work do you want to keep owning yourself?","description":"Clarifies what she wants to retain versus hand off or delegate.","purpose":"topic","stage":"momentum","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Stakeholder alignment","name":"Where are expectations most likely to drift right now?","description":"Checks how well priorities and timelines are being held across stakeholders.","purpose":"competency","stage":"momentum","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Air cover need","name":"What would make the next two weeks lighter for you?","description":"Finds the most useful manager support without assuming the answer.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"lift","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Support from me","name":"What do you need from me to keep both scopes moving?","description":"Surfaces the concrete support she wants from her manager.","purpose":"topic","stage":"lift","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Energy drain","name":"Where is this split costing you the most energy right now?","description":"Locates the part of the dual role that is wearing her down.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"friction","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Priority call","name":"Given the two hats, what needs to stay top priority this fortnight?","description":"Forces a live prioritisation call for the next stretch.","purpose":"topic","stage":"momentum","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Closer next steps","name":"Given what we've covered, what should we tackle first in the next two weeks?","description":"Lands the conversation on a concrete next-step choice without opening a new thread.","purpose":"topic","stage":"lift","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]}]}
